title: Team Preset
description: Schema for VS Code agent team preset configurations

description.description: What this team does and when to use it

model_tier.description: Default model tier for all agents in this team

name.description: Agent name — must match an entry in catalog.json

description.description: What this agent does in the context of this team

model_tier_override.description: Override the team-level model tier for this agent only

tools.description: Tools this agent is allowed to use

action.description: What the agent does at this step

depends_on.description: Step numbers that must complete before this step starts

parallel_with.description: Step number this step can run concurrently with

manual.description: Slash commands that invoke this team

automatic.description: Conditions that trigger this team automatically

task_label.description: Label shown in VS Code Tasks menu

keybinding.description: Keyboard shortcut to invoke this team

status_bar.description: Whether to show a status bar button for this team
